metadata.selection_criteria: Top-ranked models by global benchmarks (LMSYS Chatbot Arena, HF Open LLM Leaderboard), multilingual capability, and Uzbek language coverage

commercial_models.name: GPT-4o
commercial_models.known_for: Broad multilingual capability, top LMSYS rankings, real-time reasoning

commercial_models.name: Gemini 2.0 Flash
commercial_models.known_for: Multimodal reasoning, strong multilingual coverage including Central Asian languages

commercial_models.name: Claude Sonnet 4.6
commercial_models.known_for: High accuracy, low hallucination rate, strong reasoning and instruction following

commercial_models.name: Grok 2
commercial_models.known_for: Real-time web access, competitive with GPT-4 on reasoning benchmarks

opensource_models.name: Qwen3-235B-A22B
opensource_models.known_for: 100+ language support, SOTA multilingual benchmarks, best open-source for Uzbek

opensource_models.name: DeepSeek-V3
opensource_models.known_for: Top open-source reasoning, competitive with GPT-4o on benchmarks, strong CJK and multilingual

opensource_models.name: Llama 4 Maverick
opensource_models.known_for: Strong multilingual via MMLU, open ecosystem, wide community support

opensource_models.name: Mixtral 8x22B
opensource_models.known_for: Efficient MoE architecture, strong multilingual capabilities, Apache 2.0 for commercial use
